daily_summary.headline: Quiet Day in Space: Routine Launches and Low Aurora Activity

top_events.title: Falcon 9 Block 5 | GPS III SV10
top_events.description: SpaceX's Falcon 9 Block 5 is set to launch the GPS III SV10 satellite for the US Space Force, marking the tenth of ten GPS III missions.
top_events.action: Watch live stream for launch details.

top_events.title: HASTE | Bubbles
top_events.description: Rocket Lab's sub-orbital launch under the HASTE program, details of the payload remain uncertain.

top_events.title: Aurora Viewing Opportunity
top_events.description: A minor aurora event with a Kp index of 4, best viewed from latitudes above 65°.
top_events.action: Check conditions if located in high latitudes.

opportunities.recommendation: Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
